name: Italian Roasted Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 each Yellow Peppers, cut into chunks
2 each Red Bell Peppers, cut into chunks
2 each Green Peppers, cut into chunks
1 pound Baby New Potatoes, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 500°F.
2. Place vegetables into an open roasting pan.
3. Toss with rosemary, chopped garlic, salt, black pepper, and enough olive oil to coat.
4. Roast for about 45 minutes, or until crisp tender.
5. Serve hot or at room temperature with fresh Italian bread, not toasted.
